title: Pompless No Life Can Pass Away;
content:
Pompless no life can pass away;
    The lowliest career
    To the same pageant wends its way
    As that exalted here.
    How cordial is the mystery!
    The hospitable pall
    A "this way" beckons spaciously, --
    A miracle for all!
meaning:
"Pompless No Life Can Pass Away;" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
